libraries.name: Vuetify
libraries.notes: Material Design opinionated. v3 breaking migration. Strong enterprise adoption.

libraries.name: PrimeVue
libraries.notes: Unstyled mode added in v4. Best Vue data components. Fast release cadence.

libraries.name: Element Plus
libraries.notes: Dominant in Chinese enterprise market. Element UI heritage.

libraries.name: Reka UI
libraries.notes: Formerly Radix Vue. Zero styles. WAI-ARIA gold standard in Vue ecosystem.

libraries.name: Naive UI
libraries.notes: TypeScript-first theme system is best-in-class. Smaller community.

libraries.name: MUI
libraries.notes: Most installed React lib. Material Design. Bundle size concern. v6 breaking.

libraries.name: Ant Design
libraries.notes: Enterprise-grade. Best i18n. Alibaba-maintained. Distinct visual identity.

libraries.name: shadcn/ui
libraries.notes: Copy-paste model. No npm bundle — skip size phase. AI tooling best-in-class.

libraries.name: Mantine
libraries.notes: Best DX in React ecosystem. 60+ hooks. Error messages best-in-class.

libraries.name: React Aria
libraries.notes: Adobe-maintained. AAA accessibility gold standard. Zero styles. Steep learning curve.

libraries.name: Quasar
libraries.notes: Full Vue framework with SSR, PWA, Electron. Material Design. CLI scaffolding. Broadest platform coverage.

libraries.name: Nuxt UI
libraries.notes: Official Nuxt team. Built on Reka UI primitives. Tailwind-first. Fast iteration.

libraries.name: shadcn-vue
libraries.notes: Vue port of shadcn/ui. Copy-paste model. Built on Reka UI. Tailwind CSS. No npm package.

libraries.name: Arco Design Vue
libraries.notes: ByteDance design system. Strong data components. Enterprise-focused. Built-in icon library.

libraries.name: TDesign Vue Next
libraries.notes: Tencent design system. Strong enterprise adoption in China. Multi-framework (Vue, React, miniprogram).

libraries.name: Radix UI
libraries.notes: Foundation for shadcn/ui. Zero styles. WAI-ARIA gold standard. Per-component packages.

libraries.name: Chakra UI
libraries.notes: Emotion-based styling. v3 migration to Ark UI. Strong accessibility. Style props API.

libraries.name: NextUI
libraries.notes: Built on React Aria. Tailwind CSS. Modern aesthetic. v2 rewrite. Framer Motion animations.

libraries.name: Headless UI
libraries.notes: Tailwind Labs. Minimal set (12 components). Zero styles. Vue + React. Frequently paired with Tailwind UI.

libraries.name: DaisyUI
libraries.notes: CSS-only Tailwind plugin. Zero JS. 32 built-in themes. Framework-agnostic. Smallest footprint.

libraries.name: Tailwind UI
libraries.notes: Commercial product by Tailwind Labs. Markup patterns, not installable components. React + Vue templates.

libraries.name: Flowbite
libraries.notes: Tailwind-based. Vue, React, Svelte, Angular ports. Built-in chart components via ApexCharts.
